query: SELECT t1.col2, t1.col3, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tpcds1g.table_0 AS t1 JOIN tpcds1g.table_1 AS t2 USING (id) WHERE t1.col1 > 0 GROUP BY t1.col2, t1.col3 ORDER BY t1.col3
